title: Right-Clickable Nametags
description: As simple as it gets, you can right click to type a name into a nametag rather than using an Anvil.
body:
# Right-Clickable Nametags
- right click on a nametag to change its name
- after using right click, nametag is highlighted with enchantment glow.
- use v1.0.0 if you don't want Enchantment glow.

### What it looks like:
![2026-02-03 21-43-57](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d84a3456-7016-43a2-8602-6cd6409d865f)

Inspired by a post to /r/MinecraftSuggestions by /u/Different-Job-2064 on Reddit
